case_title: ABRAMSON, JONATHAN VS CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL AS TO DEFT "DEPARTMENT OF TRANS- PORTATION". SERVICE BY SHERIFF AS TO TUTOR-SALIDA CORP.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,907.00 FILED BY ABRAMSON, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION TUTOR-SALIDA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABRAMSON, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION TUTOR-SALIDA CORPORATION $2,907.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,967.00, TUTOR -SALIBA CORPORATION -DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY OF DEFT TUTOR-SALIBA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUTOR-SALIDA CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2007 - JUDGMENT.
